species.notes: P.B. Pelser (29-Mar-25): the names Asplenium polyodon G.Forst. and Asplenium falcatum Lam. have been misapplied to plants from the Philippines. These plants may belong to Asplenium macrophyllum Sw., Asplenium oxyphyllum Kunze, or an unnamed species from Luzon (Salgado 2017). Asplenium polyodon G.Forst. does not occur in the Philippines (Salgado & Fraser-Jenkins 2013).
